div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 102px; height: 1px; padding-top: 82px; margin-left: -1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #525252;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#525252, #E9E9E9); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

svg.style: fill-rule: evenodd; clip-rule: evenodd; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-miterlimit: 2; font-family: initial;
